# Self-Improvement Tasks — ~/.claude Configuration
<!-- Generated by /self-improve on 2026-05-29.
     Review each item, remove any you don't want,
     then run: /plan-mission implement code-review-tasks.md -->

## Must fix (Critical)

- [ ] `templates/autonomous-settings.json` — Template is used as a full replacement by `hooks/autonomous-toggle.sh`, silently dropping `Stop` (notify-on-stop), `SessionStart` (session-start.sh), `UserPromptSubmit` (project-init.sh + record-turn-start.sh), and `PreCompact` hooks. Autonomous mode runs without completion notification, project initialization, or turn recording. Fix: add those four hook entries to `autonomous-settings.json`, mirroring the hook blocks from `~/.claude/settings.json`.

## Should fix (Warning)

- [ ] `rules/parallelism.md:68-72` — Model table stale and incomplete: (1) lists "Opus 4.7" instead of `claude-opus-4-8`; (2) lists "Haiku" without pinning to `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001`; (3) no effort parameter guidance (`xhigh`/`high`/`medium`/`low`); (4) Sonnet 4.6 effort guidance absent. Fix: update model IDs to exact strings; add an "Effort" column or footnote: "Opus default: `adaptive`; use `high`/`xhigh` for multi-path architecture decisions. Sonnet defaults to `high`; lower to `medium` only if token-sensitive and task is well-scoped."

- [ ] `agents/plantuml-visual-qa.md`, `agents/04-quality-security/powershell-security-hardening.md`, `agents/04-quality-security/ad-security-reviewer.md`, `agents/03-infrastructure/cloud-architect.md` (opus), `agents/01-core-development/graphql-architect.md` (opusplan), `agents/02-language-specialists/java-architect.md` (opusplan), `agents/05-data-ai/llm-architect.md` (opusplan) — All seven Opus-routed agents lack explicit output-length constraints or output-shape specification. Per arxiv:2604.00025, Opus models over-elaborate on planning and analysis tasks without explicit brevity constraints. Also missing in `skills/plan-mission/SKILL.md` Phase 3 and Phase 5 Opus invocations. Fix: add to each agent's system prompt and to plan-mission Phases 3/5: "Return only the structured result — no preamble, no trailing summary. Format: [specify schema or bullet list per task]."

- [ ] `rules/code-principles.md` (YAGNI section, 10 bullets), `rules/memory.md` (Curator Criteria section, 8 bullets), `rules/research-sources.md` (Tier 1 section, 7 bullets; Tier 3 section, 7 bullets), `agents/01-core-development/backend-developer.md` (64-bullet flat opening section), `agents/01-core-development/api-designer.md` (API Contract Discipline 19 bullets; Developer Experience 40+ bullets) — Sections exceed the ≤6 prescriptive constraints limit from `prompting-quality.md` (MOSAIC research). The backend-developer 64-bullet flat section is the most severe. Fix: split oversized sections into named sub-sections ≤6 items each; for backend-developer, add `##` headers grouping the 64 bullets into themed sub-sections of ≤6 each.

- [ ] `agents/04-quality-security/architect-reviewer.md:6`, `agents/04-quality-security/code-reviewer.md:6` — Both set `model: haiku`. Architecture review and code review require multi-path reasoning — exactly the tasks `parallelism.md` reserves for Sonnet minimum. Fix: change both to `model: sonnet`.

- [ ] `post-compact-context.md` — Missing 9 rule categories that fall out after compaction: `retry-idempotency.md` (backoff, jitter, idempotency keys), `logging.md` (structured JSON, required fields, no PII), `naming-conventions.md` (folder structure, file naming, DB naming), `environment.md` (CAPS_SNAKE naming, startup validation, redaction), `pr-workflow.md` (branch naming, 400-line limit, squash merge), `observability.md` (SLO-first, RED metrics, on-call gate), `prompting-quality.md` (≤6 constraints, register shifting, context budget), `testability.md` (pure functions first, functional core/imperative shell), `research-sources.md` (5-tier source hierarchy). Also missing: memory recall sequence (search Mem0 → read .agent-notes → state findings). Fix: add condensed restore blocks for each; keep file under 120 lines total.

- [ ] `agents/01-core-development/microservices-architect.md` — No `## Required Rules` section. Only an inline tilde-path reference to `~/.claude/rules/observability.md` which is non-functional in subagents (blank-slate context). Fix: add `## Required Rules` citing: `architecture.md`, `observability.md`, `security.md`, `error-handling.md`, `api-design.md`, `research-sources.md`.

- [ ] `agents/02-language-specialists/typescript-pro.md` — No `## Required Rules` section. Fix: add `## Required Rules` citing: `testing.md`, `testability.md`, `security.md`, `error-handling.md`, `code-principles.md`.

- [ ] `CLAUDE.md:57-74` (Rules section) — Four rule files added since the last update are absent from the index: `environment.md`, `naming-conventions.md`, `pr-workflow.md`, `retry-idempotency.md`. Fix: add a bullet for each with a one-line scope description.

- [ ] `rules/extended-thinking.md` — No note that extended thinking is deprecated on Sonnet 4.6 and removed on Opus 4.8. Code following this file may attempt it on current models and receive errors. Fix: add a warning near the top: "Deprecated on Sonnet 4.6, removed on `claude-opus-4-8`. Use `type: 'adaptive'` with the `effort` parameter instead."

- [ ] `rules/pr-workflow.md:20-23` vs `rules/autonomous-execution.md:58-64` — Contradiction: pr-workflow prescribes squash merge for feature branches, but autonomous-execution creates per-task commits with task IDs that squash destroys. Fix: add a note to `autonomous-execution.md`: "Mission-brief branches use merge commits (not squash) to preserve task-ID traceability on main."

- [ ] `hooks/notify-on-stop.sh:2`, `hooks/record-turn-start.sh:2` — Both missing `-u` and `-o pipefail`. An unbound variable in notify-on-stop.sh silently produces wrong elapsed time. Fix: change to `set -euo pipefail` in both; add Linux notification fallback to notify-on-stop.sh: `elif command -v notify-send &>/dev/null; then notify-send ...`.

- [ ] Cross-skill pattern: 26 of 28 skills have no model routing. Every skill runs all steps on whatever model is active. Fix: add a model routing note to each skill's preamble: "Sonnet for implementation; Haiku for verification/scoring; Opus only for architecture decisions." Priority skills to fix first: `code-review`, `explore`, `changelog-generator`, `fix`, `review-pr`.

## Consider improving (Suggestion)

- [ ] `README.md` — `sonnetplan` is referenced but is not a valid Anthropic model ID. Fix: replace with `claude-sonnet-4-6`.

- [ ] `skills/auth-setup/SKILL.md`, `skills/analytics-setup/SKILL.md`, `skills/compliance-setup/SKILL.md`, `skills/payments-setup/SKILL.md`, `skills/brand-knowvah/SKILL.md`, `skills/i18n-setup/SKILL.md`, `skills/powerpoint-addin-setup/SKILL.md` — Seven skills write TypeScript but none run `npx tsc --noEmit` in verification. Fix: add `npx tsc --noEmit` to each skill's verify step.

- [ ] `skills/auth-setup/SKILL.md`, `skills/payments-setup/SKILL.md`, `skills/compliance-setup/SKILL.md`, `skills/analytics-setup/SKILL.md` — Four security-critical skills produce no tests. Fix: add a step to write at minimum: a happy-path test, a rejection test, and an idempotency test for any webhook handler.

- [ ] `rules/autonomous-execution.md:105` — "Same failing fix" threshold ambiguous. Fix: clarify: "If the same code location or approach has been changed 3 or more times consecutively without resolving the same failing check, STOP."

- [ ] `rules/autonomous-execution.md:118-141` — Two-tier STOP / PUSH FORWARD is missing the third tier used in well-structured agent instructions. Consider restructuring as: **STOP — Wait for human**, **ACT WITH LOG — Proceed but record in decision journal**, **ACT SILENTLY — Stylistic choices only**.

- [ ] `~/.claude/.claude/settings.json:71-76` — Four entries use hardcoded absolute paths (`/Users/scottseely/.claude/hooks/...`). Fix: replace with `~/.claude/hooks/...` form.

- [ ] `skills/file-organizer/SKILL.md` — Uses `find -printf` and `md5sum`, both Linux-only. Fix: `find ... -ls | awk ...` and `command -v md5 && md5 || md5sum`.

- [ ] `skills/generate-question-bank/SKILL.md` — Hardcoded path `/Users/scottseely/git/nursing-pharmacology` in dry-run command. Fix: replace with `$(pwd)` or a prompted `BOOK_DIR` variable.

- [ ] `settings.json` — Duplicate Skill permission entries: `"Skill(plan-mission)"` subsumed by `"Skill(plan-mission:*)"`, same for `update-config`. Also: `"Bash(pnpm visual:capture)"` and `"Bash(pnpm visual:compare)"` are project-specific one-offs. Fix: remove duplicate no-wildcard Skill entries; move pnpm visual commands to the relevant project's `.claude/settings.json`.

- [ ] `rules/autonomous-execution.md` — Task budgets (beta on Opus 4.7+) enable self-moderating token use across agentic loops. Fix: add note under Startup Sequence: "Optional cost control: set `task_budget_tokens` for long missions (beta, requires `task-budgets-2025-02-19` header)."

## Inline comments to add (Notes)

- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` — Move the "Verification" section (currently section 5 of 7) to immediately after "Interaction Style." It is a first-principle anti-hallucination constraint; front-loading reduces the chance it is skipped under context pressure.

- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` — Replace the 4-line memory-curator stub ("Local `.agent-notes/` observations + long-term Mem0...") with: "Search Mem0 before every task; state what you found and how it affects scope." Saves budget on every session.

- [ ] `rules/parallelism.md` model table — add inline note:
  ```
  // Extended thinking deprecated on Sonnet 4.6, removed on claude-opus-4-8.
  // Use type: "adaptive" with effort parameter; budget_tokens is a legacy pattern.
  ```

- [ ] `hooks/project-init.sh:26` — Mem0 URL hardcoded. Add:
  ```bash
  MEM0_URL="${MEM0_URL:-localhost:8765}"
  ```
